codeReview.summary: Feature requirements are largely met: selector includes all requested modes plus Off, org-chart nodes are colorized per mode, legend renders, and click-to-open detail panel behavior is preserved. I found two non-blocking maintainability/UX gaps.

issues.description: Performance hotspot: each card computes `buildOverlayContext(allEmployees)` inside `useMemo`, and `buildOverlayContext` scans all employees for salary/tenure ranges. On large org charts this creates O(n^2) work per overlay render. Actionable fix: compute overlay context once at org-chart level (or in a memoized selector/store) and pass it to cards.

Categorical legends do not expose a neutral 'No data' entry when some nodes fall back to neutral (e.g., empty department), so not all rendered node colors are explained by the legend. Actionable fix: include a `hasMissing` signal in legend data and render a neutral swatch/label for categorical modes when missing values exist.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS.md says 'Known Pre-Existing Issues: None yet', but worker validation/handoff repeatedly references pre-existing scheduled changes test failures and existing lint warnings. This mismatch can mislead workers during required validation steps.
Shared architecture docs are now stale on client state inventory after this feature introduced `overlayStore`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: New store added in commit a6c5b014ed1d1c847911079b687b3df1786e1353 at packages/client/src/stores/overlayStore.ts, but .factory/library/architecture.md state list does not mention overlayStore.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Implementation skill procedure requires `npm run test` in the final validator block, but transcript execution for this UI feature relied on `npm run test:client` + `typecheck` + `lint` after implementation. Procedure likely needs clarification on when full-suite test is mandatory vs scoped validation given known server-test instability.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md (Run Validators section) compared with transcript skeleton for worker 97c603f1-f9c6-491e-894e-f6a36c115e93 (post-implementation Execute calls show `npm run test:client`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`).

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, skill, and commit a6c5b014 for data-overlays-heatmaps. Feature behavior matches scope with non-blocking performance and legend completeness gaps; no blocking correctness or security issues found.
